message:
feat(fp-frame): add drop_columns, clip_with_series, nlargest_multi

- DataFrame::drop_columns: drop multiple columns at once
- Series::clip_with_series: element-wise clip using Series bounds
- DataFrame::nlargest_multi/nsmallest_multi: top-N by multiple columns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
